description: Export substitution map for the curated artifact /lib/ toolkit (ADR-0089 Addendum A5 · FRE-527 #2 · feeds FRE-530). For each asset hosted at artifacts.frenchforet.com/lib/, gives the public-CDN twin at the same version, the SRI (sha384) computed from OUR pinned bytes, whether the public twin is CORS-verified (ACAO present), classic|module loading, and the ultimate fallback. three.js + fonts have no faithful public classic twin (bespoke IIFE / UA-varying font CDN) → inline-only.
generated_from: personal_agent_secrets infrastructure/terraform-cloudflare/artifact_lib_substitution_map.json — generation source (SRI computed from the hosted /lib/ bytes beside the Worker terraform); this public copy is the runtime mirror consumed by FRE-530. Regenerate there and re-sync here on any pin change.

entries.name: katex
entries.note: Relative url(fonts/…) refs resolve under the same jsdelivr katex/dist/ path on substitution; KaTeX font subresources travel with this stylesheet.

entries.name: pagedjs
entries.note: eval_gated: excluded from the verify-lib default assert set until confirmed eval-free under the artifact CSP (which omits 'unsafe-eval').

entries.name: three
entries.note: Inline-only: bespoke esbuild IIFE/global build (global THREE, REVISION 171). Modern three ships ESM + CJS only — no browser-global IIFE — so there is no faithful public classic twin to substitute.

entries.name: source-serif-4
entries.note: Inline-only (UA-varying font CDN). OFL. Bytes are the Fontsource variable build (@fontsource-variable/source-serif-4, latin wght-normal).

entries.name: playfair-display
entries.note: Inline-only (UA-varying font CDN). OFL. Bytes are the Fontsource variable build (@fontsource-variable/playfair-display, latin wght-normal).

entries.name: jetbrains-mono
